description: Noche skill registry — defines available skills, activation contexts, and dependencies

skills.name: SUPERPOWER
skills.description: Autonomous superagent — default mode. Drives canvas, orchestrates agents, generates specs and production code.

skills.name: /figma-use
skills.description: Foundational Figma canvas skill — MCP tool decision tree, Auto Layout, variables, self-healing loop, Code Connect. Load before any /figma-* skill.

skills.name: /figma-generate-design
skills.description: Create new screens and pages using existing components and design tokens. Prefers use_figma for design-aware writes.

skills.name: /figma-generate-library
skills.description: Create Figma component library from codebase with Code Connect parity. Uses batch operations for speed.

skills.name: /figma-audit
skills.description: Audit design system for consistency, accessibility, token adoption, and Code Connect coverage. Read-only analysis with scored report.

skills.name: /figma-prototype
skills.description: Create interactive prototypes with flows, transitions, and user journey mapping. Generates standalone HTML prototype.

skills.name: /multi-agent
skills.description: Parallel agent orchestration with box widgets, coordinated handoffs, and error recovery across ports 9223-9232.

skills.name: Atomic Design
skills.description: Complete Atomic Design methodology reference — atoms through pages, token architecture, component API design, shadcn/ui mappings.

skills.name: Dashboard from Research
skills.description: Transform research data (Excel, CSV, stickies) into interactive dashboards with dataviz specs and generated code.

activationContexts.design-creation: Creating new screens, pages, or layouts
activationContexts.design-review: Auditing design quality, consistency, or accessibility
activationContexts.prototype-creation: Creating interactive prototypes or user flows
activationContexts.research-to-dashboard: Transforming research data into visual dashboards
